    o.user_id AS customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders,
    ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o

    total_spend DESC

results.name: product_return_risk
results.detail: intent=1.00, calculation=1.00, recall@3=1.00, mrr=1.00, ndcg@3=1.00, retrieval_use=1.00, retrieval_harm=0.00%, faithfulness=1.00, multi_turn=n/a, usefulness=pending, operational=0.00, report=degraded, sql_source=verified, behavior=mismatched, failed_constraints=none

diagnostics.candidate_sql:
SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    p.category AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS items_sold,
    ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS gross_sales,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)), 3) AS return_rate
FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
JOIN
    `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p
ON
    oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY
    product_name,
    category
HAVING
    items_sold >= 20
ORDER BY
    return_rate DESC,
    gross_sales DESC
LIMIT 15

results.name: regional_returns_follow_up
results.detail: intent=1.00, calculation=1.00, recall@3=1.00, mrr=0.50, ndcg@3=0.63, retrieval_use=1.00, retrieval_harm=0.00%, faithfulness=1.00, multi_turn=1.00, usefulness=pending, operational=1.00, report=complete, sql_source=verified, behavior=matched, failed_constraints=none

diagnostics.candidate_sql:
SELECT u.state AS state, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue_to_returns FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND DATE_TRUNC(DATE(oi.created_at), QUARTER) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), QUARTER) GROUP BY state ORDER BY lost_revenue_to_returns DESC
LIMIT 100
diagnostics.report_answer: California lost $4,695.70 in revenue to returns, while New York lost $1,697.71 in revenue to returns for order items created last quarter.
report_highlights: California lost more revenue to returns ($4,695.70) than New York ($1,697.71) in the last quarter.
California's lost revenue to returns was approximately 2.77 times higher than New York's.

results.name: regional_returns_follow_up
results.detail: intent=1.00, calculation=1.00, recall@3=1.00, mrr=0.50, ndcg@3=0.63, retrieval_use=1.00, retrieval_harm=0.00%, faithfulness=1.00, multi_turn=1.00, usefulness=pending, operational=0.00, report=complete, sql_source=verified, behavior=matched, failed_constraints=none

diagnostics.candidate_sql:
SELECT
  u.state AS state,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS lost_revenue_to_returns
FROM
  `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
JOIN
  `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o
ON
  oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN
  `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u
ON
  o.user_id = u.id
WHERE
  DATE(oi.created_at) >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), QUARTER)
  AND DATE(oi.created_at) < DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), QUARTER)
  AND u.state IN ('California', 'New York')
  AND oi.status = 'Returned'
GROUP BY
  state
ORDER BY
  lost_revenue_to_returns DESC
LIMIT 100
diagnostics.report_answer: California lost $4,695.70 in revenue to returns, while New York lost $1,697.71 during the last quarter. California lost more revenue to returns than New York.
report_highlights: California lost revenue to returns: $4,695.70
New York lost revenue to returns: $1,697.71

SELECT u.state AS state, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS returned_revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON oi.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND oi.status = 'Returned' AND DATE(oi.created_at) >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), QUARTER) AND DATE(oi.created_at) < DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), QUARTER) GROUP BY state ORDER BY returned_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100
diagnostics.report_answer: California lost more revenue to returns than New York in the last quarter.
